images.caption: Figure 1:An overview of our Process-Supervised GRPO framework. For each generated response, we use the Perceval to create a token-level penalty mask. This mask is used to calculate a fine-grained token-level advantage, which is then incorporated into the GRPO objective to penalize hallucinatory tokens and improve the model’s perceptual grounding.
Figure 2:The proportion of responses identified byPercevalas containing hallucinations during training.
Figure 3:Case study of the visual reasoning process from models trained with GRPO and our method.
